discussion_posts.name: henriquebelotto
discussion_posts.content: I noticed that I submit the same solution multiple times, the run time varies a lot.\nThat is a quite bad design of LeetCode as it makes things harder to compare, since one solution might have a very fast response and 1 minute later, that same solution is "Slow".

discussion_posts.name: Neemdar
discussion_posts.content: Can you solve it in N time without using extra memory? I.e. no hash set or dictionary and not a n^2 solution where you check every other element.
